exercises.name: Cable Bent Over Row
exercises.description:
1.Bend forward at your waist with your knees slightly bent and your back flat while holding the handles with your arms straight.

2.Pull the handles towards your chest.

3.Lower the handles back to a straight-arm position, keeping your back flat throughout.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Bicep Curl
exercises.description:
1.Stand facing the low pulley and attach a short bar to the low cable. Grasp the bar with your palms up and stand with your arms straight.

2.Bending on the elbows, curl the bar up towards your shoulders. Pause

3.Lower the bar returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Curl and Press
exercises.alternateName: bicep curl to shoulder press cables
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright holding the handles at your sides with your arms straight.

2.Raise the handles up to your shoulders, bending at your elbows. Do not sway back and forth as you lift and lower the handles.

3.Lower the handles returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Curtsy Lunge
exercises.description: Cable Curtsy Lunge

exercises.name: Cable External Rotation
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright holding a cable in one hand across your mid-section with your elbow bent at 90 degrees and your upper arm against your body. 

2.Pull the cable out and away from your body, keeping your elbow at 90 degrees and your upper arm against your side.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Cable Flat Chest Fly
exercises.description:
1.Lie on a flat bench holding the handles, arms extended.

2.Raise the handles above your chest, elbows slightly bent.

3.Lower down the handles returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Front Raise
exercises.description:
1. Standing upright, grabbing the straight bar with both hands.

2.  Raise arm fully extended. Raise arm until hands are at eye level. Ensure core is tight while raising arm. 

3. Lower to starting position. Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Full Kneeling Pallof Press
exercises.description: Kneel on both knees with cable at chest. Press forward with both hands, maintaining core stability to resist twisting.

exercises.name: Cable Glute Crossover Kickback
exercises.alternateName: Glute Medius Kickback, Cable Step Over Straigh Leg Hip Extension
exercises.description: Step over the cable with the working leg behind. Keep the leg straight and extend it back in a diagonal path. Pause at the top and return.

exercises.name: Cable Hamstring RDL
exercises.description: Cable Hamstring RDL

exercises.name: Cable High Bicep Curl
exercises.alternateName: High Elbow Cable Bicep Curls Overhead
exercises.description:
1) Attach the stirrup attachment to two overhead cable pulleys. 

2) Stand in the middle of the weight stack and grasp both handles with an underhand grip. 

3) Your arms should stretch straight out to your sides. 

4) Keeping your elbows still, curl your hands towards your shoulders, pause, and return to the start position.

exercises.name: Cable High-Low Chop
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright facing to one side holding a handle in both hands with your arms straight over one shoulder.

2.Pull the cable down from your shoulder to your opposite hip.

3.Concentrate on moving your hips and shoulders, not your arms.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.description:
1.Stand to the side of a cable system with the cable attached to the ankle of your outer leg.

2.Draw this leg out and away from your body. Keep both legs straight and maintain your balance by holding onto the system if necessary.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Cable Incline Bench Seated Tricep Extension
exercises.description:
1.Lie on an incline bench facing away from a cable system, holding a rope at head height with your elbows bent.

2.Straighten your arms out in front, keeping your shoulders steady.

3.Bend at the elbows, returning the cable to the start position.

exercises.name: Cable Incline Chest Fly
exercises.description:
1.Lie on an incline bench set at 45 degrees holding the handles on your side, elbows slightly bent.

2.Raise the handles up over your chest.

3.Lower the handles returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Internal Shoulder Rotation
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright holding a cable out to the side with your elbow at 90 degrees and your upper arm against your side.

2.Pull the cable across your mid-section, keeping your elbow at 90 degrees and your upper arm against your side.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Cable Iron Cross Pulldown
exercises.description:
1.Stand holding handles with your arms straight out to sides at shoulder height.

2.Pull the handles down to your sides, keep your arms straight.

3.Raise the handles returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Iso Half Kneeling Pallof Press
exercises.description: In a half kneeling stance, hold the cable straight out in front of your chest and maintain tension without moving. Engage your core.

exercises.name: Cable Kayak Row Variation
exercises.description: Cable Kayak Row Variation

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Alternating Twisting Crunch
exercises.description:
1.Kneel holding a rope cable in front of you, elbows slightly bent.

2.Curl your head and torso down to one side towards your knees, keeping your hands at the sides of your head.

3.Return upright returning to starting position.

4.Repeat and alternate.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Crunch
exercises.description:
1.Kneel and grasp a cable rope attached to a high pulley, arms extended.

2.Curl your head and torso down to your knees, hands at the sides of your head.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling High-Low Chop
exercises.description:
1.Kneel holding a rope in both hands with your arms straight over one shoulder.

2.Pull the cable down from your shoulder to your opposite hip. Concentrate on moving your hips and shoulders, not your arms.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Low-High Chop
exercises.description:
1.Hold a rope in both hands with your arms straight to the side of one hip, kneeling on the inside knee, arms straight, keeping the shoulders square.

2.Pull the cable up from the side of your hip to over your opposite shoulder, twisting your torso and keeping your arms straight. Concentrate on moving your hips and shoulders, not your arms.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.description:
1.Kneel facing away from a cable system holding the handles in each hand at the back of your head, elbows bent.

2.Straighten your arms overhead, keeping your shoulders steady.

3.Bend at the elbows returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Rotational Row
exercises.description:
1.Kneel on one knee holding a handle in the hand on the same side with your arm straight and your back flat.

2.Pull the handle straight into your chest, elbows back and hand towards the shoulder.

3.Return to starting position by lowering the handle back to a straight-arm position.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Row
exercises.description: Kneel facing the cable machine. Grab the handle with both hands and pull toward your torso, keeping elbows close to your body. Squeeze your back.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Single Arm Lat Pulldown
exercises.description: Kneel facing the cable machine. Pull the handle down with one arm from overhead to your side, keeping elbow tucked. Engage your lats.

exercises.name: Cable Kneeling Single Leg Donkey Kickback
exercises.description: Kneel on all fours with the cable attached to one ankle. Drive that leg up and back, keeping the knee bent at 90°. Squeeze the glute, then return.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright holding the cables with your hands crossed and your feet hip-width apart. 

2.Raise the handles up and outward to shoulder height, keeping your arms straight or with a slight bend at the elbows.

3.Lower the handles returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.
